items.text:
Recreation Center Locker Policy

A $5 refundable deposit is required for any gym locker rental from October 1 to December 15. Lockers must be cleared and unlocked by 9:00 PM each evening. Students may contact Mr. Diaz in Room 110 for keys.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when must lockers be emptied each day?
questions.explanation: The notice states that lockers must be cleared and unlocked by 9:00 PM each evening, which is nine o'clock.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the locker rental deposit?

options.A: It will be returned to the student after the rental period.
options.B: It will be added to a campus dining meal account.
options.C: It will be donated to the recreation program fund.
options.D: It will be charged again at every monthly renewal.

questions.explanation: The notice describes the deposit as refundable, which implies that the money will be returned to the student when the rental ends.

items.text:
Subject: Lab Safety Training Tomorrow

Hi Priya,

This is a reminder that your required lab safety training is tomorrow, March 8, from 1:30 to 3:00 PM in Wexler Hall, Room 220. Please bring a printed copy of the consent form to Dr. Patel.

Thanks,
Teaching Lab Office

questions.stem: According to the email, where will the training take place?
questions.explanation: The email specifies that the training will be held in Wexler Hall, Room 220.

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Priya bring to the training?

options.A: A digital copy of her lecture notes
options.B: A printed copy of the consent form
options.C: A signed letter from her academic advisor
options.D: A spare pair of laboratory safety goggles

questions.explanation: The email instructs Priya to bring a printed copy of the consent form to Dr. Patel.
